name: NUSCALE POWER Corp
summary: Part I Unless the context otherwise requires, all references in this section to NuScale, the Company, we, us or our refer to the consolidated operations of NuScale Corp and NuScale LLC. Overview NuScale is redefining nuclear power through the development of proprietary and innovative SMR technology that the Company believes will deliver safe, scalable, cost-effective and reliable carbon-free power.
